name: compliance trace: legal_review_status_for_consulted[] array reflects the legal_review_status for each cited control at generation time (section 2.8 + section 2.9)
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule:g-x-001]
  legal_review_status: reviewed_by:legal:2026-01-01
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc --consulted-compliance soc2-tsc --controls-consulted CC8.1 --controls-file "$PWD/controls.yaml" --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json" && grep "reviewed_by:legal:2026-01-01" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
